text:
Audio got a massive upgrade this week. We wired up ElevenLabs SFX and Music v2, plus Stable Audio 2.5 for long-form generation. (Oh, and ElevenLabs TTS is now 40% cheaper to run, which is nice). 

We also spent some time in the community greenhouse merging a bunch of your app submissions. Keep them coming. Open source audio is sounding pretty good right now. 

Docs and endpoints are live in the repo. 🎧✨

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #generativeai #audioai #stablediffusion #buildinpublic
